introduction: Bluefish takes us around the globe to tell stories of people trying to break out of their bubbles of isolation. From Tokyo to Tinsel Town, Berlin to Bogota, Mumbai to Manitoba, from you to me. Bluefish is a collectively created film, lead by visionary filmmaker Clark Middleton, filmed remotely during the pandemic in three dozen different locations worldwide with an international cast, captured on mobile devices in 4K resolution. Now in post production. Brothers discuss their mental health issues with devastating results...a young therapist is confronted by a traumatized ICU worker, an actor auditions for a famous director who was once a high school sweetheart, a European woman and a Black American man confront police brutality, a father reaches out to his daughter in the US from a South American prison, siblings fight over how best to honor a Grandmother who survived the Holocaust but not Covid - 19. And many more stories linked in a chain of longing for connection. The screen is a window. Reach through.
